summary: On the Pokrovsk direction, the 46th Brigade destroyed enemy forces, drones, vehicles, communication equipment, and electronic warfare systems, with UAV operators demonstrating high skill and effectiveness. Ukrainian forces are deploying new drone systems, including the SHADOX reconnaissance-strike UAV from Black Forest Systems, the multifunctional Banderyk-24 platform from Drone Space Labs, and humanoid Phantom MK-1 robots from Foundation for battlefield testing. Iranian-backed militias carried out a fiber-optic FPV drone attack on the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport, while Ukrainian drones have begun operating on non-standard frequencies to evade jamming. Russian forces are struggling with logistics as Ukrainian drones systematically target supply lines and rear infrastructure, causing widespread disruption. On the Konstantinovsky direction, a combined artillery and FPV drone strike destroyed a Ukrainian T-80U tank, and the Russian "Yolka" anti-drone system has been effective against Ukrainian fixed-wing "Hornet" UAVs. Ukrainian FPV pilots are adapting tactics to counter Russian defenses, including targeting infantry and armored vehicles.
